name: devbattle
description: A developer-focused communication and coding competition platform

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install && cd ../judge-service && pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:judge"
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
